title: coris monspeliensis subsp. hispanica
intro: Coris monspeliensis subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish bugloss or hispanic bugloss, is a sub-species of the Coris monspeliensis plant, which is a type of perennial herb belonging to the Boraginaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Coris monspeliensis subsp. hispanica include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to act as a natural expectorant to help relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and other medicinal products.
